description.en:
Enhances the in-game radio for local music files. Features shuffle mode, radio volume hotkeys, per-vehicle radio memory, and outside-vehicle audio fading.
FEATURES: - Toggle shuffle with F9 (rebindable) - Radio volume up/down hotkeys (rebindable, default LShift+6 / LShift+4) - Each vehicle remembers its own radio state and volume - Radio fades as you walk away from a vehicle - Shuffle builds from your full music library instantly
All keybindings are configurable in the Controls menu.
description.de: Verbessert das In-Game-Radio für lokale Musikdateien. Shuffle-Modus, Lautstärke-Hotkeys, fahrzeugspezifische Radioeinstellungen und Entfernungs-Fade.
description.fr: Améliore la radio en jeu pour les fichiers musicaux locaux. Mode shuffle, raccourcis de volume, mémoire radio par véhicule et fondu audio à distance.
